titles.en: Amīr al-mu’minīn on az-Zubayr's allegiance and his son's betrayal

text: ٤٥٣. وَقَالَ (عليه ‏السلام): مَا زَالَ الزُّبَيْرُ رَجُلاً مِنَّا أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ حَتَّى نَشَأَ ابْنُهُ الْمَشْؤُومُ عَبْدُ اللهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: 453. Amīr al-mu’minīn, peace be upon him, said: az-Zubayr remained a man from our house till his wretched son ‘Abdullāh came forth. [1]
